eggs.zh: 你的创造力指数堪比文艺复兴大师——建议今天请半天假去美术馆。
eggs.en: Your creativity rivals the Renaissance masters. Take a half day for the museum.

eggs.zh: 心理学家说你的大脑结构像迷宫——连你自己都会迷路。
eggs.en: Psychologists say your brain is like a maze. Even you get lost in it.

eggs.zh: 你的共情能力强到能感受到宠物的情绪。你的猫今天心情不好。
eggs.en: Your empathy lets you sense your pet's mood. Your cat is having a rough day.

eggs.zh: 据测算，你昨晚的决定中有73%其实是潜意识做的。它想告诉你：该睡了。
eggs.en: 73% of your decisions last night were subconscious. It says: go to bed.

eggs.zh: 严谨性测试显示：你认真读了每道题。连这一条也是。
eggs.en: Conscientiousness check: you read every question carefully. Even this one.

eggs.zh: 开放性满分。说明你连测什么都无所谓。
eggs.en: Perfect Openness score. You don't even care what this test measures.

eggs.zh: 宜人性过高警告：你可能刚刚对弹出的广告说了不好意思。
eggs.en: Agreeableness alert: you may have just apologized to a pop-up ad.

eggs.zh: 神经质维度显示：你的大脑默认在灾难预演模式。今天预演得不错，挺精彩。
eggs.en: Your brain runs in disaster-prehearsal mode. Today's rehearsal was quite dramatic.

eggs.zh: 研究表明选中立最多的人，在生活中也最难点外卖。
eggs.en: Research: people who pick Neutral most often also struggle to order takeout.

eggs.zh: 你的外向性得分意味着你是派对里帮主人洗碗的那种人。
eggs.en: Your Extraversion means you're the type who helps wash dishes at parties.

eggs.zh: 本测试由一群INTP开发。他们现在在争论这个彩蛋分类对不对。
eggs.en: Built by a team of INTPs. They're now debating whether this egg is correctly categorized.

eggs.zh: 你做这道题时，世界上有47个人同时在测。其中一人选了和你一样的答案。平行宇宙确认+1。
eggs.en: 47 people take this test simultaneously. One picked the same answer. Parallel universe confirmed.

medium.zh: 关于我是谁这个问题，大五人格给了你五个数字。不算回答，但至少比GPS坐标浪漫一点。
medium.en: To 'Who am I?' the Big Five gives five numbers. Not an answer, but more romantic than GPS coordinates.

medium.zh: McCrae & Costa 1989年发表MBTI映射论文时用的是手算。你的MBTI概率背后有35年前的纸笔余温。
medium.en: McCrae & Costa hand-calculated the 1989 MBTI paper. Your probabilities carry 35-year-old pencil-on-paper echoes.

medium.zh: IPIP量表最初为了让心理学研究免费而生。你刚参加了一场持续30年的学术开源运动。
medium.en: IPIP was created to make psych research free. You just joined a 30-year academic open-source movement.

medium.zh: 本测试不告诉你你是谁。它只告诉你，在120道题上你的回答和某些人有多相似。真正的答案在你自己那儿。
medium.en: This test won't tell you who you are. Just how your answers resemble a population. The real answer's inside you.
